# RESTfulAPI — architect

> Recipe: Complete workflow for designing, implementing, and documenting a production-grade REST API.

API Name: {{api_name}}
Purpose: {{api_purpose}}
Endpoints: {{endpoints}}

Design a production-grade API including:
1. RESTful resource design
2. Endpoint specifications
3. Request/response formats
4. Error handling strategy
5. Rate limiting approach
6. Security considerations
7. Versioning strategy

When you are done, hand off to the next agent in the chain.
